title: Assistant QS Manager (Changi/ 5 days)
description:
Our esteemed client in the Construction industry is seeking an Assistant Quantity Surveyor Manager to join their dynamic team:

  • Employment Type: Permanent
  • Position: Assistant Quantity Surveyor Manager
  • Location: Changi
  • Working Hours: 5 days, Office Hours
  • Salary Package: Up to $10,000 + Bonus

Job Responsibilities:

  • Manage and supervise a team of QS in all post-contract administration, including cost control, claims processing, and final account settlement.
  • Develop and manage project budgets, control cash flow, and prepare monthly cost reports for financial tracking and forecasting.
  • Administer the main contract and subcontracts, managing all variations, progress claims, extension of time requests, and loss and expense claims.
  • Evaluate, negotiate, and award subcontractor and supplier packages in alignment with project budgets and procurement strategies.
  • Liaise with clients, consultants, and subcontractors to resolve commercial issues and ensure strict contract compliance.
  • Certify subcontractor payments, variation orders, and final accounts.
  • Drive value engineering and cost-saving initiatives to enhance project profitability.
  • Ensure all commercial activities comply with relevant contract standards and local regulations.
  • Maintain comprehensive and accurate commercial documentation and records.
  • Participate in project meetings and audits, providing critical commercial oversight.

Job Requirements:

  • At least a Bachelor’s Degree in QS, Construction Management, or a related field.
  • Minimum of 5 years of relevant experience at a managerial or senior level, preferably within a main-con environment.
  • In-depth knowledge of standard construction contracts, contract law, and local regulatory standards.
  • Strong understanding of local construction costs, materials, and procurement practices.
  • Proficiency in QS software and the Microsoft Office suite.
  • Able to start in short notice or immediately.


Ready to apply? Here’s how:

  • Click the APPLY button, or
  • Email your resume (in MS Word or PDF format) to adelin@intuitrecruitment.com. Include the job title in your email subject line for prompt processing.

Only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


By submitting your application, you consent to the collection and use of your personal data under Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA).
